stories.title: Franco found criminally responsible, but no jail
stories.summary: Wander Franco was declared criminally responsible for the sexual and psychological abuse of a minor by a Dominican judge, but will not serve a sentence for it.

stories.title: Misiorowski hits 100 mph 57 times in 12-K gem
stories.summary: Brewers ace Jacob Misiorowski matched a career high with 12 strikeouts, carried a no-hitter into the sixth inning and hit 100 mph on more than half his pitches in Monday's win over the Cardinals.

stories.title: Lakers hire 'rocket scientist' as assistant GM
stories.summary: The Lakers made their first significant move of the offseason by hiring Rohan Ramadas as an assistant GM under president and GM Rob Pelinka, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Jays' Cease heading to IL with hamstring strain
stories.summary: Blue Jays right-hander Dylan Cease will be placed on the 15-day injured list after suffering a left hamstring strain, manager John Schneider said.

stories.title: UCLA tabbed top seed for NCAA baseball tourney
stories.summary: UCLA was rewarded for its dominant, wire-to-wire run through the regular season with the No. 1 seed for the NCAA tournament.
